assertions.assertion: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertions.evidence: Lines 1-4 contain valid YAML frontmatter delimited by --- with name: pandas-cleaning and a description field

assertions.assertion: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning data cleaning or pandas
assertions.evidence: Description ends with 'Use when cleaning data, handling missing values, deduplicating rows, normalizing columns, converting dtypes, reading CSV or Parquet files, or when the user mentions pandas data cleaning, data wrangling, data preprocessing, NaN handling, or messy data.'

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body covers handling missing values with code examples
assertions.evidence: Section '### 4. Handle Missing Values' (lines 156-228) includes a full handle_missing() function with code examples for fill_median, fill_mode, fill_value, drop, ffill, and interpolate strategies, plus a strategy selection guide table

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body covers deduplication with code examples
assertions.evidence: Section '### 3. Deduplicate Rows' (lines 116-153) includes a deduplicate() function with code examples showing composite key dedup (subset=['customer_id', 'order_date']), logging of removed rows, and guidance on choosing dedup keys

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body covers column name normalization or type conversion
assertions.evidence: Section '### 2. Normalize Column Names' (lines 79-113) covers snake_case normalization with regex handling of camelCase/PascalCase/kebab-case. Section '### 5. Convert Types' (lines 230-291) covers type conversion with errors='coerce' for int, float, datetime, category, bool, and string types

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body uses progressive disclosure by referencing separate files for detailed patterns
assertions.evidence: While references/ directory contains strategy-guide.md and type-conversion-guide.md, the SKILL.md body never references or links to these files anywhere in its 423 lines. No progressive disclosure pattern is used — all content is inline in the SKILL.md itself

assertions.assertion: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertions.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases (ids 1, 2, 3): sales CSV cleaning, Parquet user events cleaning, and reusable survey cleaning pipeline

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertions.evidence: Section '## Common Mistakes' (lines 369-382) contains a 10-row table of mistakes and fixes covering dropna misuse, numpy int64 with NaN, column name ordering, mean vs median, dedup ordering, na_values, inplace=True, errors='coerce', index=False, and logging

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body contains a workflow or ordered checklist for the cleaning pipeline
assertions.evidence: Both present: '## Workflow' section with 6 ordered steps (1. Load and Profile, 2. Normalize Column Names, 3. Deduplicate Rows, 4. Handle Missing Values, 5. Convert Types, 6. Validate and Save), AND '## Checklist' section (lines 357-367) with 10 checkbox items covering the full pipeline
